actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component (fileID 123183794) with m_Script guid 50410efda0128f248aadbf8266a903cb is the TrafficLights script attached to Mesh_TrafficLight. Its serialized fields map to Light components: Red(fileID 8569639267829841366, guid 743b330bb9f325948b9118bc7695a4c1, type 3), Green(fileID 2097357867), Yellow(fileID 888664352). The Start() coroutine runs automatically to cycle lights (Green.enabled=true for 30s, then Yellow.enabled=true for 5s, then Red.enabled=true for 30s) and logs 'on' twice; there are no m_Calls defined. This trigger holds time to observe the automatic cycle to ensure Start coroutine coverage.
